name: Tofu Whipped Cream (Martin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the tofu in cold water.
2. Press the tofu between several layers of paper or clean cloth towels to squeeze out as much water as possible.
3. Break the tofu into small pieces or mash it.
4. Add the tofu and remaining ingredients (maple syrup, vanilla, arrowroot powder, cinnamon) to a blender or food processor.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Taste and adjust flavoring if desired; blend again if necessary.
7. Chill before serving. Use in place of whipping cream on pies and other desserts.
